# Zuro

> CLI tool for generating production-ready Express + TypeScript backend modules.

## Docs
- [Introduction](https://zuro-cli.devbybriyan.com/docs): Getting started and module selection guidance
- [Init](https://zuro-cli.devbybriyan.com/docs/init): Scaffold a production-ready Express + TypeScript backend
- [Auth](https://zuro-cli.devbybriyan.com/docs/auth): Backend auth module with Better Auth or JWT
- [Database](https://zuro-cli.devbybriyan.com/docs/database): Drizzle or Prisma setup
- [Uploads](https://zuro-cli.devbybriyan.com/docs/uploads): File upload module for S3, R2, and Cloudinary
- [Validator](https://zuro-cli.devbybriyan.com/docs/validator): Request validation middleware
- [API Docs](https://zuro-cli.devbybriyan.com/docs/docs): OpenAPI + Scalar generation
- [Rate Limiter](https://zuro-cli.devbybriyan.com/docs/rate-limiter): Rate limiting middleware
- [Mailer](https://zuro-cli.devbybriyan.com/docs/mailer): SMTP or Resend email module
- [Error Handler](https://zuro-cli.devbybriyan.com/docs/error-handler): Centralized API error responses

## Landing Pages
- [Node.js Backend Starter](https://zuro-cli.devbybriyan.com/nodejs-backend-starter)
- [Express TypeScript Boilerplate](https://zuro-cli.devbybriyan.com/express-typescript-boilerplate)
- [Backend Auth Module for Express](https://zuro-cli.devbybriyan.com/backend-auth-module-express)
- [Drizzle Starter for Express](https://zuro-cli.devbybriyan.com/drizzle-starter-express)
- [Express Upload Module](https://zuro-cli.devbybriyan.com/express-upload-module)
- [OpenAPI Starter for Express](https://zuro-cli.devbybriyan.com/openapi-starter-express)

## Canonical
- [Homepage](https://zuro-cli.devbybriyan.com)
